cardinal_rules.title: Vital Module Placement
cardinal_rules.description: No vital module (memory, reasoning, speech, motor, vision, or cortex) may exist under any subfolder. All must reside directly under the repository root.
cardinal_rules.enforcement: If a vital module is detected under a nested directory, move it to the root and update all imports accordingly.

cardinal_rules.title: Proximity Principle
cardinal_rules.description: Modules that directly interact or share dependencies must reside in the same directory proximity for cohesion.
cardinal_rules.enforcement: If a module depends on another and resides in a different directory, alert and suggest co-location.
